system.powerDescription:
Grace crystallizes into armaments for you. You may determine the form and appearance of this weapon but it always has the following traits. 

• It has a range equal to CAT+1. 
• It has impact magnitude/destructive capability equal to CAT. 
• Once per scene, after you taste a creature’s blood this weapon gains +1D on its next attack against that creature 
• It is considered a mundane object. 
• As part of any action with this weapon you may spend one psyche burst to have the action be considered supernatural. 

If this weapon fails to kill a creature in the scene it was created you take 1d3 stress as It sups upon your own blood.
